profiles.name: Arjun Venkataraman
profiles.bio: Film sound designer with 18 years crafting sonic worlds for Tamil and Telugu cinema. Known for immersive environmental soundscapes in period films.

education_training.institution: Film and Television Institute of India

endorsements.note: Exceptional spatial audio sensibility.

profiles.name: Priya Krishnaswamy
profiles.bio: Independent music producer specializing in indie-pop and fusion. Blends Carnatic classical with contemporary electronic to create genre-defying soundscapes.

endorsements.note: Brilliant ear for East-West fusion.

profiles.name: Khalid Ansari
profiles.bio: Boom operator with 11 years of on-set experience across Bollywood and regional features. Specialist in single-take live recordings and outdoor chase sequences.

endorsements.note: Disciplined boom technique in chaotic outdoor environments.

profiles.name: Meghana Pillai
profiles.bio: Versatile singer trained in Hindustani classical and contemporary playback. Has sung for major Bollywood films and national brand campaigns.

endorsements.note: Pure tone, remarkable control in upper registers.

profiles.name: Devraj Bora
profiles.bio: Foley artist with 8 years specializing in Northeast Indian cinema and indie documentaries. Known for hyper-realistic texture work — rain, fabric, rural ambience.

education_training.institution: Satyajit Ray Film and Television Institute

profiles.name: Zara Kapoor
profiles.bio: Voice artist and dubbing specialist fluent in 4 languages. Works across animated series, audiobooks, corporate narration, and game voice acting.

endorsements.note: Natural character differentiation — rare in young artists.

profiles.name: Ranjit Ghosh
profiles.bio: Veteran music director for Bengali and Hindi cinema with 22 years in the industry. Known for emotionally layered orchestral scores that carry narratives without dialogue.

endorsements.note: His scores breathe where dialogue cannot.

profiles.name: Sneha Iyer
profiles.bio: Carnatic-trained composer writing for dance-theatre and short films. Uses mridangam rhythms as structural spine for contemporary cinematic pieces.

endorsements.note: Deep rhythmic intelligence rarely seen this young.

profiles.name: Harjeet Sandhu
profiles.bio: Punjabi folk and pop music producer with 10 years building the Bhangra-Electronic crossover sound. Has produced tracks charting on UK Asian charts and collaborated with artists across three continents.

endorsements.note: He understands what Punjabi music feels like in the body.

profiles.name: Lalitha Subramaniam
profiles.bio: Senior sound designer and re-recording mixer with 20 years. Delivered final mixes for 60+ features in 5 languages. Dolby Atmos certified, with credits on award-winning Tamil and Malayalam films.

education_training.institution: Film and Television Institute of India

endorsements.note: Her mixes make silence speak.

profiles.name: Anand Mishra
profiles.bio: Rising Bollywood playback singer with a powerful baritone. Has sung for indie films and music albums. Currently performing live on the college circuit.

profiles.name: Fatima Noorani
profiles.bio: Sound designer for theatre and experimental cinema. Creates reactive sonic environments using generative audio tools. Based in Pune, working with independent theatre groups nationally.

endorsements.note: Her soundscapes transform space itself.

profiles.name: Vikram Nair
profiles.bio: Malayalam film composer with 14 years and 35 features. Fuses Mappilapattu folk traditions with modern cinematic orchestration. Twice Kerala State Film Award winner.

endorsements.note: Music that is inseparable from the image.

profiles.name: Ritika Sharma
profiles.bio: Emerging voice artist and singer. Trained in Western classical singing. Pursues voice-over work for ads and animation alongside live gig circuits in Delhi-NCR.

profiles.name: Suresh Tiwari
profiles.bio: Veteran boom operator with 24 years on Bollywood sets. Trained over 40 juniors, known for near-silent footwork and anticipatory mic placement on dialogue-heavy ensemble films.

education_training.institution: Film and Television Institute of India

endorsements.note: 24 years and still the most precise boom on set.

profiles.name: Pooja Ramachandran
profiles.bio: Film composer and Bharatanatyam-trained musician who writes music for contemporary dance-films and feminist shorts. Explores the sonic space between silence and rhythm.

endorsements.note: She makes music that dancers can live inside.

profiles.name: Girish Patel
profiles.bio: Gujarati and Bollywood music producer specializing in Garba-Electronic fusion. Produced tracks for Navratri events reaching millions of viewers. Bridges festival folk with streaming-era production.

profiles.name: Amara Osei
profiles.bio: Afro-Indian music producer based in Mumbai. Blends West African percussion traditions with Indian electronic music, creating a pan-global groove. Released two EPs on international labels.

profiles.name: Nalini Devi
profiles.bio: Veteran Carnatic vocalist and playback singer with 25 years. Has sung for 200+ Tamil, Telugu, and Kannada films. A regular voice in classical sabha circuits during the December season.

endorsements.note: One of the finest voices carrying the tradition forward.

profiles.name: Rohan Shetty
profiles.bio: Young foley artist and field recordist based in Bengaluru. Obsessively catalogues unique urban and natural sounds of South India. Contributes to indie game audio projects.

profiles.name: Kavitha Reddy
profiles.bio: Telugu music director fusing folk Janapada traditions with contemporary film music. Has scored 18 Tollywood films and mentors upcoming folk artists at her studio in Hyderabad.

endorsements.note: She carries the heartbeat of the Telugu soil in her music.

profiles.name: Dhruv Malhotra
profiles.bio: Delhi-based indie-pop singer-songwriter with an alternative rock edge. Released debut EP on BandLab; performs 60+ shows annually in the indie circuit. Self-taught multi-instrumentalist.

profiles.name: Mamta Barua
profiles.bio: Assamese singer performing Bihu, Borgeet, and modern folk-pop. Has sung for Assamese films and is a recognized voice on Doordarshan Assam. Active in cultural preservation through music.

endorsements.note: A voice that carries the entire Brahmaputra valley.

profiles.name: Nikhil Varghese
profiles.bio: Senior sound designer for Malayalam, Tamil, and Hindi OTT films. Specialist in psychological thriller sound — layered dissonance, off-sync ambiences, and ear-fatigue design for horror and tension.

education_training.institution: Film and Television Institute of India

endorsements.note: Nikhil's sound makes the ordinary terrifying.

profiles.name: Tara Singh
profiles.bio: Non-binary music producer and sound artist creating ambient and electronic music exploring gender, identity, and urban loneliness. Has released music under the alias 'Iridescent Static'.

profiles.name: Bhavani Nambiar
profiles.bio: Voice artist specializing in dubbing and cultural voice direction for South Asian streaming platforms. Directs voice casts for dubbed versions of international titles into Malayalam and Tamil.

projects.title: Avatar: The Way of Water (Tamil Dub)

endorsements.note: Exceptional cultural sensitivity in localization direction.

profiles.name: Sameer Qureshi
profiles.bio: Veteran foley supervisor with 23 years and 90+ feature film credits across Hindi, Marathi, and Urdu films. Leads a full-service foley stage in Mumbai. Known for authentic period textures — 1940s Bombay, Mughal court, colonial-era fabric.

education_training.institution: Film and Television Institute of India

endorsements.note: His foley breathes life into silence.

profiles.name: Amrutha Krishnan
profiles.bio: Upcoming voice artist and indie singer exploring Malayalam and English fusion songs. Active on short-form video platforms with a growing fanbase for ASMR and soft pop content.

profiles.name: Govind Prasad
profiles.bio: Dhrupad and Khayal vocalist with 19 years of performance. Has performed at the Sawai Gandharva Bhimsen Mahotsav and HCL Concerts series. Brings the North Indian classical tradition into modern recording projects.

endorsements.note: A faithful torchbearer of the Banaras Gharana.

profiles.name: Kezia Thomas
profiles.bio: Composer and music producer for short films and independent theatre in the Kerala Christian music tradition. Fuses Syriac choral heritage with ambient cinematic scoring.

profiles.name: Prashant Dubey
profiles.bio: Boom operator with 9 years on Hindi TV serials and streaming series. Expert in cramped interiors and tight drama sets. Consistently delivers clean dialogue in multi-camera live-action setups.

profiles.name: Janaki Murugavel
profiles.bio: Tamil music director known for haunting melodies rooted in Isai Vellalar traditions and Nadaswaram music. Scores for Tamil village dramas and rural realist cinema.

endorsements.note: His Nadaswaram carries the weight of caste history — that's rare.

profiles.name: Ayesha Baig
profiles.bio: Pakistani-origin classical ghazal singer based in Lucknow. Trained under Ustad-level guidance in the Lucknow thumri tradition. Performs and records primarily in Urdu and Farsi.

profiles.name: Bibek Chettri
profiles.bio: Nepali-Indian composer and multi-instrumentalist from Sikkim. Creates scores for Himalayan landscape documentaries and Nepali cinema, blending folk flute traditions with orchestral layers.

profiles.name: Nandita Ghoshal
profiles.bio: Rabindra Sangeet specialist and film singer who bridges the Bengali classical tradition with contemporary cinema. Regularly collaborates with auteur directors for films that require emotionally precise vocal performances.

endorsements.note: A voice that understands what Tagore wanted to say.

profiles.name: Ravi Shankar Naidu
profiles.bio: Music producer and mixing engineer for Telugu and Kannada film industries. Runs a private studio in Hyderabad offering full-stack music production and mixing. 26 years of experience across 130+ films.

endorsements.note: The finishing touch any big score needs.

profiles.name: Amita Deshpande
profiles.bio: Marathi singer and voice trainer based in Pune. Trained in Natya Sangeet — the classical singing form unique to Marathi theatre. Actively performs and trains the next generation of stage musicians.

profiles.name: Deepak Bhutia
profiles.bio: Sound designer and boom operator for documentary films in Northeast India. Has worked extensively in Arunachal Pradesh and Nagaland capturing indigenous ritual soundscapes for international documentary houses.

profiles.name: Rekha Sinha
profiles.bio: Music director and composer who has scored 15 Hindi OTT series. Trained in Western film scoring. Brings layered orchestral texture to crime dramas, psychological thrillers, and prestige biopics.

endorsements.note: She scores for tension that you feel in your sternum.

profiles.name: Subramaniam Pillai
profiles.bio: Doyen of South Indian film sound with 30 years of experience. Re-recording mixer and sound supervisor for over 200 Tamil, Telugu, and Hindi films. Ran the legendary Mani Sound Studio for two decades.

education_training.institution: Film and Television Institute of India

endorsements.note: There is no South Indian cinema without Pillai sir's ears.
The last word on sound in any room he enters.
